title: A/B Testing Video Thumbnails for Maximum AEO Click-Through
excerpt: A great answer is useless if no one clicks. Learn how to systematically test video thumbnails to increase your CTR and signal authority to Answer Engines.
author: Corey Spicer
content:
Click-Through Rate (CTR) remains one of the strongest ranking signals for both traditional Video SEO and emerging AEO platforms.

The Science of Thumbnails

Don't just guess what works. Implement systematic A/B testing for your thumbnails. Test high-contrast text vs. no text, human faces showing emotion vs. product close-ups, and different color palettes. Tools like TubeBuddy or YouTube's native 'Test & Compare' feature can help you identify the visual language that resonates best with your audience.
